Description: Cap on system total annual carbon dioxide equivalent emissions. Active via ``Co2L`` in the ``{opts}`` wildcard.
Reference value of system total annual carbon dioxide equivalent emissions. Used when a relative reduction target is specified in ``{opts}`` (e.g. ``Co2L0.7``).
Exogenous CO₂ price applied to marginal costs when ``Ep`` is present in ``{opts}``.
Derive ``co2.limit`` from historical emission data instead of the configured ``limit`` value.
True: emissions are obtained from the automatic emission extraction procedure.
Reference year for automatic emission extraction (1970–2018).
Year-by-year CO₂ reduction trajectory for myopic and sector-coupled runs.
Switch to activate planning-horizon-specific CO₂ budgets.
If true and a CO₂ limit already exists (e.g. from ``Co2L`` in ``{opts}``)
column5: overwrite it with the budget value.

Description: Which ``co2`` scalar to scale by ``year`` factors: ``limit`` or ``base`` (sibling keys above)

Values: Dictionary with planning horizons as keys
Description: CO₂ budget as a fraction of the selected ``base_value`` scalar. If ``absolute`` is selected then the factor is the annual cap [tCO₂-eq/a].
